name: National Gallery of Zimbabwe
description: Zimbabwe's premier institution for visual arts, supporting Paivapo's mission to broaden access to cultural knowledge.

name: Book Aid International
description: Working with libraries across Africa to provide access to books and support a culture of reading.

name: Harare Arts Trust
